name_en: Top-tier original M12096 Red As a classic design, the Neverfull Bandouliere Inside Out medium tote features Monogram canvas and striped fabric in a double-sided design. Removable shoulder strap for crossbody, or convert to a hobo bag with side hooks. Dimensions: 31 × 28 × 14 cm
